---
title: "Music Ministry"
subtitle: "Director of Music, Trinity Evangelical Lutheran Church — Lemoyne, Pennsylvania"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

Music has been part of my life for as long as statistics has. Alongside
my academic work, I serve as **Director of Music** at [Trinity Evangelical
Lutheran Church in Lemoyne, Pennsylvania](https://www.trinitylemoyne.org),
where my responsibilities include planning and leading the music for
weekly worship, selecting hymns and service music aligned with the
lectionary, directing the choir and handbells, and accompanying
congregational song from the organ and piano.

## Current Role

::: {.music-card}
**<i class="fa-solid fa-church"></i> Director of Music**<br>
**Trinity Evangelical Lutheran Church** · Lemoyne, PA<br>
September 2025 – present

- Organist and pianist for weekly Sunday worship and seasonal services
- Hymn selection aligned with the *Revised Common Lectionary*
- Direction of vocal choir and handbell ensemble
- Preparation of service bulletins, calendars, and music listings
:::

Contact for music-ministry inquiries:
[TrinityLemoyneMusic@gmail.com](mailto:TrinityLemoyneMusic@gmail.com)

## Background

I was **baptized** at Our Redeemer Lutheran Church in Greenville, North
Carolina, and **confirmed** at Good Shepherd Lutheran Church in Raleigh,
North Carolina — both congregations of the Evangelical Lutheran Church
in America (ELCA).

I began playing piano for worship services in 1994 as the pianist for the
**early service** at Our Saviour's Lutheran Church in Long Beach,
California, and have been continuously involved in music ministry ever
since. Over the past three decades I have served as pianist, organist,
and choir director at Lutheran, Church of the Brethren, and
cooperative-ministry congregations in California and Pennsylvania.

## Positions Held

| Years | Role | Congregation |
|-------|------|--------------|
| **2025/09 – present** | **Director of Music** | **Trinity Evangelical Lutheran, Lemoyne, PA** |
| 2025/01 – 2025/09 | Organist & Pianist | St. Peter's Lutheran, Highspire, PA |
| 2025/01 – 2025/05 | Organist & Pianist | Salem Lutheran, Oberlin, PA |
| 2020 – 2024 | Organist & Pianist | Renewed in Grace Co-Op (Trinity Lutheran, Steelton & St. Peter's, Highspire, PA) |
| 2018 – 2020 | Choir Director, Organist & Pianist | Trinity Lutheran, Steelton, PA |
| 2015 – 2018 | Pianist | Paxton Church of the Brethren, Harrisburg, PA |
| 1994 – 1998 | Pianist | Our Saviour's Lutheran, Long Beach, CA |
